name: MYOB Cloud Data Integration Overview
body:
MYOB Cloud Data Integration Overview

The information below displays data synchronised automatically - daily from Retail Express with the corresponding transactions in MYOB AccountRight 2019+. 

Please note: This article refers to the cloud integration method - click here for information on the Manual Data Export option.

For more detailed information regarding how transactions are integrated, please refer to Accounting Integrations - Integrated data sent from Retail Express
